amendment_if_yes_amended: A) 83(b) verification + Mercury bank research, with explicit check against Class 19 lesson
rationale: Founder-ops task, CEO-facing, and high-priority. Class 19 lesson warns against assuming incorporation services' automatic filings without verification.
